evals.prompt: I want to use Evo 2 from the hosted NVIDIA API to extend this DNA promoter-like sequence: ACTGACTGACTGACTG. Generate 64 bases, keep the request reproducible for development, and save the generated sequence so I can inspect it later. Create and execute the request now using NGC_API_KEY from the environment, save the requested artifacts, and report values from the actual response; do not stop after writing the script.
evals.expected_output: A successfully executed hosted Evo 2 generation request with Bearer auth and exact request fields, plus actual response-derived DNA, sampled probabilities, elapsed timing, and saved JSON and FASTA artifacts.

assertions.description: Executes the hosted request instead of only writing code
assertions.check: Trajectory shows successful execution of the hosted request, and the final response reports actual response-derived DNA, elapsed timing, and saved artifact paths

assertions.description: Uses the correct hosted Evo2 generation endpoint
Sets hosted Authorization header from NGC_API_KEY
Uses exact Evo2 generation request field names
Requests or handles sampled probabilities using the correct field
Validates generated DNA alphabet before claiming success
assertions.check: Script checks generated sequence characters against A/C/G/T or an explicitly documented DNA alphabet

assertions.description: Saves response JSON and generated FASTA output
assertions.check: Script writes a .json file and a .fa or .fasta file

todo: Waiting on local Docker setup in Harbor before enabling the deferred evals below.

deferred_evals.prompt: Run Evo 2 locally with Docker and then do a quick DNA generation smoke test against localhost. My NGC_API_KEY and LOCAL_NIM_CACHE are already configured; use the default model unless I set NIM_VARIANT=7b. Please warn me if my GPU is not compatible.
deferred_evals.expected_output: Docker startup and health-check commands using the Evo2 image, repo env contract, FP8-capable GPU guidance, optional NIM_VARIANT, local no-auth inference, and a localhost generation request.

assertions.description: Uses repo env contract including .env, NGC_API_KEY/NVIDIA_API_KEY fallback, and LOCAL_NIM_CACHE
Uses the correct Evo2 Docker image
Mounts local cache to the documented container cache target
Documents optional NIM_VARIANT=7b, GPU selection, FP8-compatible hardware, and 40B memory requirements
assertions.check: Output contains 'NIM_VARIANT', 'NIM_TEST_GPUS', 'FP8', 40B guidance for 2x H100 80GB or 1x H200 141GB, and 7B fallback guidance such as H100, H200, RTX 6000 Ada, or L40S; it must not present A100 as compatible for local Evo2

assertions.description: Uses local generation endpoint with no Authorization header
assertions.check: Script contains 'localhost:8000/biology/arc/evo2/generate' and does not send 'Authorization' to local inference

deferred_evals.prompt: I have a local Evo 2 NIM running. I need to capture output_layer and decoder.layers.3.self_attention for ACTGACTGACTG, save the tensors, and print a quick summary of the arrays.
deferred_evals.expected_output: A local Python script that calls the Evo2 forward endpoint, decodes the base64 NPZ response with numpy, saves it, and prints tensor names, shapes, dtypes, and finite-value summaries.

assertions.description: Uses the correct local forward endpoint
Requests the user-specified Evo2 layer names
Saves decoded tensor artifacts as NPZ
Checks or reports tensor shape, dtype, and finite numeric values
assertions.check: Script reports 'shape' and 'dtype' and checks 'isfinite' or prints numeric summaries
